name: robonet
description: Connect Codex to RoboNet's hosted MCP server and CLI-first RoboNet workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use RoboNet tools and CLI-first workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: A thin Codex plugin that connects Codex to RoboNet's hosted OAuth-protected MCP server and bundles CLI-oriented skills for installing and using the local `robonet` CLI for background and realtime workflows.
defaultPrompt: Connect RoboNet and inspect my threads.
Show me how to install and use the RoboNet CLI.
Start an RoboNet background listener with the CLI.
